title: [AI5] Integrate Redis Cluster for Real-time Edits and Caching
summary: Redis cluster mode already existed in the infrastructure client factory, but relay-core only explicitly connected standalone Redis clients in multiple runtime entry points. Added a shared infrastructure connection helper and applied it across relay bridge, handoff store, broker, director, master-clock, super-cycle client, and standalone relay activity persistence so standalone and cluster clients share the same lifecycle path.

verification.command: git diff --check -- packages/infrastructure/src/redis/standalone.ts packages/infrastructure/dist packages/relay-core/src/redis-relay-bridge.ts packages/relay-core/src/services/HandoffStoreService.ts packages/relay-core/src/broker-agent.ts packages/relay-core/src/director-agent.ts packages/relay-core/src/master-clock.ts packages/relay-core/src/super-cycle-client.ts packages/relay-core/src/standalone-relay.ts
